ddls:
CREATE TABLE "reporters" (
  "reporter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reporter */,
  "reporter_name" TEXT /* Name of the reporter (country or entity) */,
  "region" TEXT /* Geographical region of the reporter */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries related to the reporter */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the reporter */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the reporter */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reporter_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tariff_lines" (
  "tl_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tariff line */,
  "tl_code" TEXT /* Code representing the tariff line */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the tariff line */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category of the tariff line */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* Date when the tariff line becomes effective */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* Date when the tariff line expires */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tl_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "mfn_tariffs" (
  "mfn_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each MFN tariff entry */,
  "tl_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated tariff line */,
  "rate" REAL /* MFN tariff rate for the specific tariff line */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country this MFN tariff applies to */,
  "implementation_date" TEXT /* Date when the MFN tariff was implemented */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mfn_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_mfn_tariffs_tl_id FOREIGN KEY ("tl_id") REFERENCES tariff_lines ("tl_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "preferential_tariffs" (
  "preferential_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each preferential tariff entry */,
  "tl_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated tariff line */,
  "agreement_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the trade agreement that enables this preferential tariff */,
  "rate" REAL /* Preferential tariff rate for the specific tariff line */,
  "implementation_date" TEXT /* Date when the preferential tariff was implemented */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("preferential_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_preferential_tariffs_agreement_id FOREIGN KEY ("agreement_id") REFERENCES trade_agreements ("agreement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_preferential_tariffs_tl_id FOREIGN KEY ("tl_id") REFERENCES tariff_lines ("tl_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trade_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the trade category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the trade category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the trade category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Full name of the country */,
  "iso_code" TEXT /* ISO code of the country */,
  "capital" TEXT /* Capital city of the country */,
  "region" TEXT /* Geographical region of the country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* ID of the report being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the report */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, researcher, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user account */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tariff_categories" (
  "tariff_category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the tariff category mapping */,
  "tl_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the tariff line */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category of the tariff line */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tariff_category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tariff_categories_tl_id FOREIGN KEY ("tl_id") REFERENCES tariff_lines ("tl_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tariff_categories_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES trade_categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trade_agreements" (
  "agreement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trade agreement */,
  "agreement_name" TEXT /* Name of the trade agreement */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the trade agreement */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the trade agreement */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the trade agreement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("agreement_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trade_data_imports" (
  "import_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each import event */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* ID of the report being imported */,
  "import_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was imported */,
  "data_format" TEXT /* Format of the imported data */,
  "data_size" INTEGER /* Size of the imported data in bytes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("import_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trade_data_exports" (
  "export_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each export event */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* ID of the report being exported */,
  "export_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was exported */,
  "data_format" TEXT /* Format of the exported data */,
  "data_size" INTEGER /* Size of the exported data in bytes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("export_id")
)
